---
name: New Skill Proposal
about: Propose a new skill (must map to a curriculum lesson OR fill a real GTM gap)
title: "New skill: [name]"
labels: ["new-skill"]
---

## Skill name

`<kebab-case>`

## Maps to lesson

- [ ] Lesson NN — [link]
- [ ] OR fills GTM gap not covered by existing skills (explain below)

## When this skill activates

What user phrases / situations should trigger it? (3-5 examples)

## What it produces

Output format (table? draft? scorecard? canvas?)

## Why it deserves to exist

- What can't the user do today without it?
- Why isn't an existing skill enough?
- What's the wedge of operators this serves?

## Hard rules I'll enforce

What pushback will the skill apply when the user gives vague / wrong-shaped inputs?

## v2 from the start?

- [ ] Yes, will ship v2 (full v2 structure)
- [ ] No, will ship v1 lean and queue for deepening

## Estimated effort

- [ ] < 2 hours
- [ ] 2-4 hours
- [ ] 4-8 hours
